rationale: Both ensures pin `abstractify_cmessage_seq(post_i.un_acked@)` to the same `truncate_un_ack_list(...)` value, but z3 doesn't line up the two `map_values` instantiations on its own; the prelude re-asserts the common RHS and the per-step assertions force z3 to fire the right `map_values` trigger. The helper lemma `lemma_truncate_un_acked_unique` lifts pointwise view-equality on `Message`-variant `CSingleMessage`s (forced by `un_acked_list_valid_for_dst`) to structural Seq equality via the `=~~=` deep ext-equal cascade. Lifted to Vec `=~=` and combined with `num_packets_acked == seqno_acked` from both ensures, this closes the field-wise ext-equal obligation on the `#[verifier::ext_equal]` `CAckState`.
